body:
### Features
- **electron:** Ship dd-trace-electron package with reduced dependencies [#8948](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/8948)
- **General:** Trace core-API HTTP/2 servers [#9138](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9138)
- **graphql:** Trace Apollo Federation entity resolvers and skip the health-check [#9134](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9134)
- **Test Optimization:** Add EFD retry count override [#9344](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9344)
- **Test Optimization:** Diagnose and fix Jest suite skipping [#9339](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9339)

### Fixes
- **aws-sdk:** Record kinesis DSM checkpoint only when context ships [#9183](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9183)
- **graphql:** Skip Apollo health checks in Mercurius [#9363](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9363)
- **LLM Observability:** Replace Object.create(span) with delegating wrapper to preserve OTel span private-field access [#9152](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9152)
- **proxy:** Retain feature modules across tracing reconfiguration [#9331](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9331)
- **Test Optimization:** Isolate retry status by spec [#9340](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9340)
- **Test Optimization:** Preserve zero EFD retry budgets [#9341](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9341)
- **Test Optimization:** Prevent negative test durations [#9380](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9380)
- **Test Optimization:** Resolve disabled git upload immediately [#9338](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9338)
- **Test Optimization:** Support cucumber 13.1 results [#9370](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9370)
- **Test Optimization:** Wait for all worker writers [#9349](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9349)

### Performance
- **graphql:** Reuse filtered variables across resolve spans [#9225](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9225)

### Internal (CI, Testing, Benchmarking)
- **AppSec:** Select mongodb version by Node.js runtime in plugin tests [#9322](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9322)
- **ci:** Set 16 retries for dd-sts-action [#9374](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9374)
- **Dependencies:** Bump bullmq [#9350](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9350)
- **Dependencies:** Bump pnpm [#9365](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9365)
- **Dependencies:** Bump protobufjs from 8.6.5 to 8.7.0 in /vendor in the vendor-minor-and-patch-dependencies group across 1 directory [#9325](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9325)
- **express:** Exercise loopback public entry [#9291](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9291)
- **express:** Trace middleware via layer prototype dispatch [#9067](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9067)
- **General:** Make no-traces timeout test deterministic [#9372](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9372)
- **General:** Prepare lint and Vitest for TypeScript 7 [#9345](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9345)
- **General:** Preserve coverage from custom plugin jobs [#9386](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9386)
- **General:** Reject when no matching trace arrives before the timeout [#9177](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9177)
- **General:** Select latest unversioned dependency range [#9352](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9352)
- **LLM Observability:** Centralize session_id injection in handleLLMObsInjection [#9353](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9353)
- **LLM Observability:** Cover compatible SDK provider version matrix [#9332](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9332)
- **Test Optimization:** Assert complete run payloads [#9358](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9358)
- **Test Optimization:** Make STS API key fetch non-fatal [#9320](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9320)
- **undici:** Force proxy tunnel in CONNECT regression test [#9271](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9271)
